user_product.name: TaskFlow
user_product.positioning: AI-powered project management for engineering teams
user_product.target_market: Series A-C tech startups with 20-200 engineers
user_product.description: TaskFlow uses AI to automate sprint planning and surface blockers before they impact delivery. Core differentiator is deep integration with developer workflows.

signals.title: Notion launches AI-powered project templates
signals.summary: Notion announced 'Notion Projects' with AI that auto-generates project plans, timelines, and task breakdowns. Available to all Teams and Enterprise plans. Includes Gantt charts, sprint views, and automated status updates.
signals.raw_content: Notion Projects brings AI-powered project management to your workspace. Automatically generate project plans, break down epics into tasks, and get AI-suggested timelines based on your team's historical velocity...

signals.title: Notion cuts Enterprise pricing by 25%
signals.summary: Notion reduced Enterprise plan pricing from $20/user/month to $15/user/month for annual commitments. The change applies to new customers immediately and existing customers at renewal.
signals.raw_content: Enterprise plan now $15/user/month (billed annually). Includes SAML SSO, advanced permissions, audit log, and priority support. Volume discounts available for organizations over 100 seats.

signals.title: Notion hiring 15 ML engineers for SF office
signals.summary: Notion careers page shows 15 open ML/AI engineering roles focused on 'next-generation workspace intelligence'. Roles mention 'autonomous task management' and 'predictive project analytics'.
signals.raw_content: Join our AI team to build the future of work. We're hiring ML Engineers, Research Scientists, and AI Product Managers to work on autonomous agents that help teams manage projects without manual overhead...

signals.title: Linear adds GitHub Actions integration with auto-triage
signals.summary: Linear launched native GitHub Actions integration that automatically creates issues from failed CI runs, assigns them based on code ownership, and suggests priority based on blast radius analysis.
signals.raw_content: New GitHub Actions integration: Failed workflows automatically create Linear issues with full context. AI assigns to the right team member based on CODEOWNERS and recent commit history. Priority suggested based on affected services.

signals.title: Linear launches 'Linear Insights' analytics dashboard
signals.summary: Linear released a new analytics product called 'Linear Insights' offering cycle time analysis, bottleneck detection, and predictive delivery estimates. Premium feature at $5/user/month add-on.
signals.raw_content: Linear Insights: Understand your engineering organization like never before. Track cycle time, identify bottlenecks, and predict delivery dates with ML-powered estimates that learn from your team's patterns.

signals.title: Linear CEO hints at 'autonomous engineering pods'
signals.summary: Karri Saarinen (Linear CEO) tweeted about 'the end of manual sprint planning' and teased 'autonomous engineering pods that self-organize around objectives'. Thread got 2.4k likes and significant engagement from eng leaders.
signals.raw_content: @karrisaarinen: 'We're building towards a future where engineering teams don't plan sprints — they set objectives and the system orchestrates the work. Announcing something big next month. 🧵'

signals.title: Coda announces strategic partnership with Atlassian
signals.summary: Coda and Atlassian announced a deep integration partnership. Coda docs can now embed live Jira boards with bi-directional sync. Joint go-to-market with Atlassian sales team for enterprise deals.
signals.raw_content: Coda + Atlassian: The best of both worlds. Embed live Jira boards in your Coda docs with real-time sync. Edit issues directly in Coda and see updates flow back to Jira. Available for Coda Team and Enterprise plans.

signals.title: Coda launches AI Packs for engineering workflows
signals.summary: Coda released 'AI Packs' — pre-built automation templates for engineering teams including sprint retrospective analysis, bug triage, and incident response runbooks. Powered by GPT-4 and Claude.
signals.raw_content: AI Packs for Engineering: Automate your most repetitive workflows. Sprint retro summarizer analyzes your completed issues and suggests process improvements. Bug triage AI categorizes incoming issues and routes to the right team.

signals.title: Notion reportedly raising $200M at $15B valuation
signals.summary: The Information reports Notion is raising a $200M Series E at a $15B valuation, up from $10B in 2024. Sources say funds will go toward AI capabilities and enterprise sales expansion in EMEA and APAC.
signals.raw_content: According to three sources familiar with the matter, Notion is in late-stage negotiations for a $200M Series E that would value the company at $15B. The funding will accelerate AI development and international expansion.

signals.title: Linear removes seat minimums for startup plan
signals.summary: Linear quietly removed the 5-seat minimum from their Startup plan ($8/user/month), making it accessible to 2-person teams. Previously teams under 5 had to pay for 5 seats minimum. Strategic move to capture early-stage startups.
signals.raw_content: Linear Startup plan pricing update: Now available for teams of any size with no minimum seat requirement. $8/user/month gets you everything in Plus, ideal for fast-moving product teams.
